mapper.sql: id, goods_id, goods_name, sku_code, brand, spec, unit, stock_quantity, stock_low, stock_high, alert_type, alert_level, acknowledged, acknowledged_by, acknowledged_time, days_to_expiry, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM inventory_alert WHERE goods_id = #{goodsId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inventory_alert ( goods_id, goods_name, sku_code, brand, spec, unit, stock_quantity, stock_low, stock_high, alert_type, alert_level, acknowledged, acknowledged_by, acknowledged_time, days_to_expiry, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{goodsId}, #{goodsName}, #{skuCode}, #{brand}, #{spec}, #{unit}, #{stockQuantity}, #{stockLow}, #{stockHigh}, #{alertType}, #{alertLevel}, #{acknowledged, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{acknowledgedBy, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{acknowledgedTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{daysToExpiry, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )

INSERT INTO inventory_alert ( goods_id, goods_name, sku_code, brand, spec, unit, stock_quantity, stock_low, stock_high, alert_type, alert_level, acknowledged, acknowledged_by, acknowledged_time, days_to_expiry, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
( #{item.goodsId}, #{item.goodsName}, #{item.skuCode}, #{item.brand}, #{item.spec}, #{item.unit}, #{item.stockQuantity}, #{item.stockLow}, #{item.stockHigh}, #{item.alertType}, #{item.alertLevel}, #{item.acknowledged, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.acknowledgedBy, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.acknowledgedTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.daysToExpiry, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.update: UPDATE inventory_alert SET acknowledged = 1, acknowledged_by = #{acknowledgedBy}, acknowledged_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM inventory_alert WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT alert_type, COUNT(*) as count FROM inventory_alert GROUP BY alert_type

SELECT
FROM inventory_alert ORDER BY create_time DESC
